response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and full-stack development, with relevant experience in building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines, test automation, and open-source projects. However, his people-management experience is limited, and his background is more hands-on technical than strategic leadership, which may require further assessment.
strengths: Extensive experience with developer tools, CI/CD, and test automation (e.g., GitLab CI, Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner).
Proven track record in full-stack development and system design across web, mobile, and embedded platforms.
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in workshops/talks (e.g., Selenium Course, Web Internals).
concerns: Limited explicit people-management experience (only 1 role with indirect leadership; no direct reports mentioned).
No clear evidence of leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning at scale.
Mobile-platform knowledge is not prominently highlighted in the resume.
